extraction.title: EXTRACTION
extraction.description: Collection and XDR decoding of raw operator files. Transforming event data records from multiple heterogeneous sources.

transformation.title: TRANSFORMATION
transformation.description: Conversion of records into a single, interpretable format. Automated consolidation with confidential, standardized delivery.

loading.title: LOADING
loading.description: Storage in a single database and analysis via business intelligence tools to extract relevant fiscal insights.

certification.title: CERTIFICATION
certification.description: Data certification using proprietary ETL-Certification® algorithms ensuring absolute integrity and legal enforceability of results.

drc.title: Telecommunications Taxes
drc.partner: Directorate General of Customs and Excise (DGDA)

hero.title: Leading GovTech for public revenue mobilization
hero.subtitle: Certified ISO 9001 & ISO 27001 — Trusted by governments
hero.desc: Since 2016, Mazen GovTech Group has provided states with certified governance infrastructure — consolidated fiscal flow monitoring, anomaly detection and executive decision-making in real time.

vision.title: Excellence in Service of Fiscal Governance
vision.p1: MAZEN is a leading company in government technologies. Since 2016, we have built a network of highly skilled collaborators across Europe, Asia and Africa, supported by a thriving R&D department.
vision.p2: Our team includes outstanding engineers from top universities, with deep expertise in big data processing, digital taxation and public governance.
vision.step1Text: Sectors are increasingly digitized, generating massive, encrypted and heterogeneous datasets.
vision.step2Text: Our ETL-Certification® technology turns Big Data into structured, certified and legally enforceable fiscal data.
vision.step3Text: Administrations gain a complete and reliable view to maximize public revenue mobilization.
vision.supervisedSub: Across operator networks in 4 African countries

solutions.title: Two sovereign solutions,
solutions.subtitle: Two operational platforms for states. ETL-Certification® serves as the shared technological engine.

references.title: 4 deployments.
references.subtitle: Each reference represents a contractual engagement with a national administration — and verifiable figures.
references.chartNote: * Results contractually validated with partner administrations

sectors.title: 9 sectors,
sectors.desc: Our solutions bring transparency and fiscal traceability across the modern digital economy — from telecoms to online gaming.

techTransfer.title: Full transfer of
techTransfer.desc: We ensure a complete transfer of our technology to client states while providing comprehensive training to enable their teams to operate independently.
techTransfer.trainingDesc: Programs tailored to government teams — theory, practice and internal certification.
techTransfer.supportDesc: Dedicated technical support and proactive maintenance throughout the contract.
techTransfer.autonomyDesc: Your teams fully master the platform without external technological dependence.
techTransfer.hostingDesc: National infrastructure, data under state jurisdiction — no transfer to foreign servers.
techTransfer.maxIncrease: Maximum increase observed in public revenues

whyUs.title: Why states choose us
whyUs.subtitle: Four pillars underpin Mazen's excellence and the lasting trust of our government partners.

transparency.title: Full Auditability
transparency.desc: Every transaction processed by our platform is fully traceable, verifiable and legally enforceable.

founded.title: Founded in 2016
founded.desc: 38 years of institutional expertise in government technology — a recognized benchmark for fiscal governance.

digitalSovereignty.title: Digital Sovereignty
digitalSovereignty.desc: All our deployments include national hosting, full data sovereignty and complete technology transfer to state teams.

prefooter.title: Your country's fiscal

hero.title: About MAZEN
hero.subtitle: Global GovTech leader since 2016 — transforming digital economies into auditable public revenue

history.title: Technology built for sovereign administrations
history.p1: MAZEN has delivered government technology solutions since 2016. We rely on a network of highly skilled collaborators across Europe, Asia and Africa and a sustainable R&D capability.
history.p2: Our teams combine expertise in data engineering, digital taxation, compliance and governance to serve demanding institutional environments.
history.p3: Our systems analyze and process 13 billion daily transactions and supervise over $15bn in operator flows since 2009.
